# GStack GPT

GStack GPT is a custom GPT build kit for GStack Strategy 21.

It helps founders, PMs, operators, and engineering leaders turn loose product and engineering ideas into scoped strategy work, GitHub issue bodies, decision memos, review checklists, release gates, and roadmap choices.

## Primary Links

- Repository: https://github.com/ryan-winkler/gstack-gpt
- GStack: https://github.com/garrytan/gstack
- GStack site: https://gstack.lol/
- Strategy skills fork: https://github.com/ryan-winkler/strategy-skills-for-claude
- Strategy skills upstream: https://github.com/aapersh/strategy-skills-for-claude
- Ryan Winkler public context: https://github.com/ryan-winkler/ryanwinkler

## Key Files

- README.md: project overview and source links.
- builder-form.md: GPT Builder Configure values.
- instructions.md: GPT instruction payload.
- knowledge/strategy-21-reference.md: GPT knowledge reference.
- references/strategy-skills-for-claude/: imported strategy skill reference.
- test-prompts.md: preview tests for GPT behavior.

## Topics

custom-gpt, gpt-builder, strategy21, product-strategy, engineering-planning, github-workflows, decision-memos, claude-skills, prompt-engineering, release-gates
